title: Legitipack
description: An (unofficial) modpack for the hit server Legitimoose!
body:
# The Legitipack
> For the hit server Legitimoose!

## Until further notice, this project has been archived. I'm sure you can guess why.
## News may be posted in the LegitiDevs Discord.

Edit NBT, have frames in the lobby, use Legitidevs epic projects (and some others made just for the server - here *now*) in one modpack!

## FAQ

<details>
<summary>Who is Legitimoose?</summary>

Legitimoose (the Moose) is a Minecraft YouTuber that made a Minecraft server for making Datapacks.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Will you upgrade/downgrade to X version?</summary>

No. The modpack will only support the **native** version that Legitimoose is currently on.

</details>

<details>
<summary>How do I make Datapacks?</summary>

Legitimoose's YouTube has many videos on making commands and datapacks, you can see his channel [here! (https://www.youtube.com/c/Legitimoose)](https://www.youtube.com/c/Legitimoose)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Who are LegitiDevs?</summary>

The Legitidevs are a team of people that make unofficial but cool stuff for the Legitimoose server! You can check them out [here, as well as see worlds online right now!](https://legiti.dev)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Can I use this in my video?</summary>

Go ahead. Credit would be nice, but it's not required!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Can I have the logo?</summary>

[Sure! (catbox.moe)](https://files.catbox.moe/idhq9b.png)

</details>
